channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DCI Denied Entry to Tuju's Karen Home During Missing Person Investigation
item.description: On Sunday night, the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) reported that family members of former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju denied investigators entry to his residence in Karen while probi...

item.title: Tanzanians Praised for Unity and Discipline During Ramadan and Eid Celebrations
item.description: Across Tanzania, the recent Ramadan period displayed a deep sense of unity, discipline, and mutual respect among citizens of all backgrounds. The calm and safety on the streets were not accidental but...

item.title: Mall operating hours during Holy Week 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN News provides a helpful guide for shoppers and visitors regarding mall schedules during #SemanaSanta2026. As Holy Week approaches, many Filipinos adjust their routines to observe traditions an...

item.title: Kerala Police Investigate After Foetus Found Stored in Home Refrigerator
item.description: According to reports from Kerala, police have launched an investigation after a human foetus was discovered stored inside a refrigerator at a residential flat. The incident came to light when neighbou...

item.title: DCI says Raphael Tuju was at his Karen home throughout period he was reported missing
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has said that former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju was at his Karen home in Nairobi the whole time his family alleged he had gone missing. Director of...

item.title: UK government introduces major reforms to protect small businesses from late payments
item.description: The UK government has announced its most significant crackdown on late payments to small businesses in over 25 years, aiming to reduce the financial strain that forces around 1,000 firms to close each...

item.title: East Africa Faces Tough Lessons as AFCON 2027 Preparations Continue
item.description: The article explores the growing unease surrounding preparations for the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON), which Tanzania, Uganda, and Kenya will co-host. Following the controversy of the AFCON 2025...

item.title: Tanzania Officially Joins World Boxing as a Full Member
item.description: The Boxing Federation of Tanzania (BFT) has proudly confirmed that Tanzania has been formally admitted as a member of World Boxing, the global organisation recognised by the International Olympic Comm...

item.title: SA Liberals face pressure to adopt more right-wing policies following electoral defeat
item.description: Following the recent South Australian state election, the SA Liberals suffered a significant defeat, with a large swing of voters towards One Nation. In the aftermath, prominent party figures, includi...

item.title: Iran war reveals Canada’s dependence on foreign defence suppliers and slow domestic production
item.description: The article argues that the war in Iran has exposed how heavily Canada still relies on foreign suppliers for critical military equipment, especially surface‑to‑air missiles and other advanced munition...

item.title: Postmenopausal Women Lose Significantly More Weight When Combining Hormone Therapy with Tirzepatide
item.description: A recent Mayo Clinic study has found that postmenopausal women who combined menopausal hormone therapy with tirzepatide, a medication approved for overweight and obesity, lost approximately 35% more w...

item.title: Researchers Identify Protein Interaction Driving Alzheimer’s and Develop Compound to Halt It in Mice
item.description: A research team led by Professor Hilmar Bading at Heidelberg University has uncovered a key biological mechanism behind Alzheimer's disease progression. The scientists identified a harmful interaction...

item.title: B.C. Mother and Daughter Facing Harsh Conditions in U.S. Immigration Detention Centre
item.description: A British Columbia mother and her seven-year-old daughter are currently being held in a U.S. immigration detention centre in Dilley, Texas. The woman, identified as Tania Warner, has reported that the...

item.title: Mixed fans reactions follow Super Eagles’ unveiling of new 2026 jersey
item.description: The Super Eagles don show dem new 2026 jersey on Monday, dropping pictures for social media ahead of their four-nation invitational tournament for Antalya, Turkey. For the new design, dem mix differen...

item.title: Fire Erupts at Port Arthur Oil Refinery, Authorities Advise Residents to Stay Indoors
item.description: A major fire broke out at the Valero oil refinery in Port Arthur, Texas on Monday night, following an explosion that reportedly originated from an industrial heater. Local residents reported hearing a...

item.title: Air Canada flight crashes at New York airport, flight attendant survives
item.description: On March 23, an Air Canada Express flight experienced a catastrophic crash while landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport. Passengers described waking up in shock as the plane abruptly hit a fire truck...

item.title: Tanzania Entrepreneurs Win 12 Spots in 2026 Tony Elumelu Foundation Programme
item.description: Tanzania has made its mark on Africa's entrepreneurship map again after securing 12 slots in the first batch of winners for the 2026 Tony Elumelu Foundation (TEF) Entrepreneurship Programme. The annou...

item.title: Billy Slater praises Panthers’ dominant start to 2026 NRL season
item.description: NRL great Billy Slater has heaped praise on the Penrith Panthers, describing their performances across the opening three rounds of the 2026 season as 'unbelievable'. The Panthers, who have been one of...

item.title: Over 12,000 Police Officers Assigned Across Metro Manila for Holy Week Security
item.description: To ensure public safety during the Holy Week, the National Capital Region Police Office (NCRPO) has deployed a total of 12,370 personnel across Metro Manila. Maj. Hazel Asilo, NCRPO spokesperson, said...

item.title: TTV Dhinakaran Rejoins AIADMK Amid Tamil Nadu Election Preparations
item.description: TTV Dhinakaran, a prominent political figure in Tamil Nadu, has made a notable return to the AIADMK headquarters ahead of the 2026 state assembly elections. Once considered a key leader and rival with...
